records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Bell Cranel. One hour after returning from the Quest.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Bell Cranel. One hour after returning from the Quest.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Bell Cranel. One hour after returning from the Quest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not long after setting off, the phenomenon ended. In the end, we didn't even get to see the tunnel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not long after setting off, the phenomenon ended. In the end, we didn't even get to see the tunnel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not long after setting off, the phenomenon ended. In the end, we didn't even get to see the tunnel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a relief we didn't get caught up in anything dangerous, but... Didn't I tell you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a relief we didn't get caught up in anything dangerous, but... Didn't I tell you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a relief we didn't get caught up in anything dangerous, but... Didn't I tell you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That this time, there's no need for us to step in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That this time, there's no need for us to step in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That this time, there's no need for us to step in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... Still, it's a relief that it didn't turn into a major issue.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... Still, it's a relief that it didn't turn into a major issue.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... Still, it's a relief that it didn't turn into a major issue.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For some reason, I took a wrong turn along the way and ended up causing trouble for Miss Ais...
records.m_Talk_DEU: For some reason, I took a wrong turn along the way and ended up causing trouble for Miss Ais...
records.m_Talk_FRA: For some reason, I took a wrong turn along the way and ended up causing trouble for Miss Ais...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Ais?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Ais?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Ais?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, sorry. I've been so out of it since returning to Orario.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, sorry. I've been so out of it since returning to Orario.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, sorry. I've been so out of it since returning to Orario.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure about the details, but... it feels like I had some kind of dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure about the details, but... it feels like I had some kind of dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure about the details, but... it feels like I had some kind of dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... you all have been casually following us this whole time... Why aren't you heading back?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... you all have been casually following us this whole time... Why aren't you heading back?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... you all have been casually following us this whole time... Why aren't you heading back?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's because... Bell insisted on showing his gratitude.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's because... Bell insisted on showing his gratitude.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's because... Bell insisted on showing his gratitude.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, he said the same to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, he said the same to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, he said the same to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since I'm indebted to you both.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since I'm indebted to you both.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since I'm indebted to you both.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do either of you have anything you'd like?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do either of you have anything you'd like?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do either of you have anything you'd like?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bell! Aren't you going to ask me too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bell! Aren't you going to ask me too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bell! Aren't you going to ask me too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: G-Goddess!
records.m_Talk_DEU: G-Goddess!
records.m_Talk_FRA: G-Goddess!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: For some reason... it's in my pocket too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For some reason... it's in my pocket too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For some reason... it's in my pocket too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... a half piece of a Potato Popper?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... a half piece of a Potato Popper?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... a half piece of a Potato Popper?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nom.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nom.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nom.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Ais, are you sure it's okay to eat that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Ais, are you sure it's okay to eat that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Ais, are you sure it's okay to eat that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nom nom...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nom nom...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nom nom...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know the reason, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know the reason, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know the reason, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Of all the Potato Poppers I
8jve had recently... this one
8ks the most delicious.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Of all the Potato Poppers I
8jve had recently... this one
8ks the most delicious.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Of all the Potato Poppers I
8jve had recently... this one
8ks the most delicious.
